name: Hawaiian Martini
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vodka, blue curacao, and orange juice in a shaker.
2. Shake until the outside of the shaker is frosted (10-15 shakes).
3. Strain into a chilled martini glass.
4. Drop a maraschino cherry into the glass.
Serves 1.
Nutrition per serving: 125 calories, 0 grams fat (0% fat from calories), 0 milligrams cholesterol, 0 grams protein, 4 grams carbohydrate, 1 milligram sodium.
